hero_desc: Our experienced doctors and specialist team are with you at every step. Your health is our priority.
about_desc_1: As Lafromed Premium Clinic, we provide the highest quality medical services with an individual approach to every patient. With modern technologies and our experienced medical staff, your health is in reliable hands.
about_desc_2: All processes from diagnostics to treatment are carried out in accordance with international standards. The comfort and health of our patients is our main priority.
services_desc: Everything you need from primary care to specialized services is here.
dept_emergency_desc: 24/7 non-stop emergency intervention and treatment services.
dept_internal_desc: Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment with internal medicine specialists.
dept_cardiology_desc: Diagnosis with modern technology to protect your heart health.
dept_pediatrics_desc: Specialist pediatricians for your children's health.
dept_radiology_desc: Precise imaging services with MRI, CT and ultrasound.
dept_laboratory_desc: Fast and reliable blood tests and medical examination services.
dept_neurology_desc: Diagnostics and modern treatment methods for nervous system diseases.
dept_orthopedics_desc: Treatment of bones and joints, sports injuries and rehabilitation.
appointment_desc: Fill out the form, we will contact you as soon as possible.
footer_desc: We provide reliable, comprehensive and modern medical services for your health.
auth_login_desc: Carry out your online operations quickly and easily.
auth_register_desc: Create an account in a few steps and benefit from our online services.
auth_no_account_desc: Register to book online appointments, view your medical results and benefit from special campaigns.
auth_has_account_desc: If you have registered before, you can log in to your account and use our services.
doctors_desc: Our professional doctors are always by your side for your health.
